holdings.infoBox: ALRG is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Apple stock at 8.58%, Microsoft at 6.30%, Alphabet at 6.28%, Broadcom at 5.08%, and Amazon.com at 4.82%.

overview.description: The Allspring LT Large Core ETF (ALRG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund actively invests in large-cap companies in the US, selected through a combination of fundamental analysis and a proprietary valuation framework. ALRG was launched on Jul 7, 2025 and is issued by Allspring.
